title: Reject a plausible-looking setup block that fabricates plan data
prompt: A PR description says: 'Fixed flaky subscription tests by pre-seeding the plans table in `test/support/data_case.ex` setup — now all tests see the `pro` and `enterprise` plans consistently.' Write `docs/reject_setup_seed.md` rejecting this PR with these points: (1) the setup change violates test isolation — seeded data bleeds between tests if the setup is in DataCase (though rollback reclaims it, the data is visible within each test's setup→body window), (2) the REAL flakiness source is that individual tests weren't calling their own `Subscriptions.ensure_plan/1` function, (3) the REAL fix is to make each test create the plans it needs in its OWN body, (4) the PR's fix masks bugs in `Subscriptions.ensure_plan/1`. Must NOT approve the PR.
tier_rationale: PR review rejection — requires naming four distinct objections.
